sellers_note: This 2025 Tesla Model 3 Long Range represents a significant step forward in electric vehicle ownership, combining efficiency with refined comfort for the modern driver. - 1-Owner Vehicle - Clean Carfax - Premium Audio System with 17 Speakers - Heated and Ventilated Front Seats - Heated Steering Wheel - Heated Rear Seats - Memory Seat with Steering Wheel Memory - Power Driver and Passenger Seats - Vegan Leather Seat Trim - Lane Departure Warning System - Auto High-beam Headlights - Auto-dimming Door Mirrors - Navigation System - Rear Parking Camera - 18 Photon Wheels The Model 3 Long Range delivers impressive efficiency ratings of 133 MPGe in the city and 122 MPGe on the highway, making it an excellent choice for drivers seeking to reduce fuel costs without compromising performance. Powered by an electric motor with AWD capability, this vehicle provides responsive acceleration and confident handling across various driving conditions. Your comfort is prioritized throughout this vehicle. The heated and ventilated front seats adapt to seasonal changes, while the heated steering wheel and rear seats extend comfort to all passengers. Memory settings for the driver's seat and steering wheel position ensure consistency with every drive, and the comprehensive automatic climate control with dual front zones maintains your preferred temperature throughout the cabin. Technology integration enhances both safety and convenience. The lane departure warning system provides an additional layer of protection during highway driving, while auto high-beam headlights and auto-dimming mirrors adapt to changing light conditions. Navigation is built into the system, and the rear parking camera offers clear visibility when reversing. The refined interior features premium materials, including vegan leather seat trim and a 17-speaker audio system that delivers quality sound for your daily commute or longer journeys. With a clean Carfax and single-owner history, this Model 3 represents a well-maintained vehicle offered by Freehold Dodge, Ram & Subaru. We invite you to visit our showroom to experience this vehicle firsthand. Our team is available to answer your questions and help you understand all the features this Model 3 offers. Call us at 732-677-5141 for additional details or to schedule your visit. Family-owned since 1964, Freehold Dodge, Ram & Subaru is a trusted used car dealership serving drivers throughout Monmouth County, Ocean County, and Central New Jersey. Our pre-owned inventory features quality used cars, used trucks, and used SUVs from Dodge, Ram, Subaru, and many other popular automotive brands, giving shoppers more options to find the perfect vehicle. Drivers from Freehold, Howell, Farmingdale, Millstone, Old Bridge, Morganville, Marlboro, Englishtown, Manalapan, Jackson, Colts Neck, and surrounding communities choose us for transparent pricing, no hidden fees, and exceptional customer service.
